svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="AI 助手工作流" id="aiflow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-684" dy="-132" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="n1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="1 运营输入需求
自然语言描述页面" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="2 AiAssistantPanel
engine 右侧抽屉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="250" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="3 FastAPI /ai/chat
SSE 流式 + WS /ai/agent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="460" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="4 LangGraph 状态图
checkpoint + HITL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="690" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="5 LiteLLM 调模型
DeepSeek / GLM / 通义" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="900" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="6 生成页面 Schema
Qdrant 检索物料" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="1110" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hitl" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="7 HITL 人工确认
预览 Schema → 确认 / 拒绝 / 改" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="460" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="8 确认 → 注入设计器画布
运营继续微调" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="730" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="n1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="n2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e23" edge="1" parent="1" source="n2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="n3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e34" edge="1" parent="1" source="n3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="n4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e45" edge="1" parent="1" source="n4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="n5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e56" edge="1" parent="1" source="n5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="n6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6h" edge="1" parent="1" source="n6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="hitl" value="待确认 Schema"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eh8" edge="1" parent="1" source="hitl" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" target="n8" value="确认"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="erej" edge="1" parent="1" source="hitl" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#9333ea;fontSize=10;dashed=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="n4" value="拒绝 / 要求改 → 重新生成"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=6;" value="实线 = 主流程
绿 = 确认通过
紫虚 = 拒绝回环" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="1110" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

g.text: 预览 Schema → 确认 / 拒绝 / 改

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

g.text: 8 确认 → 注入设计器画布

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

g.text: 拒绝 / 要求改 → 重新生成

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));
